name: Adult Diapers
description:
Looking for donations of Adult Diapers (Size XL), preferably the pull-up/pants type, for an elderly lady whom we are supporting in the community.

She has mobility difficulties and relies on a walking stick to move around safely. She is also experiencing incontinence, and because she is quite frail, she is often unable to get to the toilet in time, especially when she is outside her home. Pull-up style diapers would help her feel more comfortable, maintain her dignity, and give her greater confidence to attend medical appointments and carry on with her daily activities.

If you have any Adult Diapers (Size XL, pull-up/pants type) to spare, your donation would make a meaningful difference in supporting her daily needs.

If you are able to help or would like more information, please feel free to reach out to Nisah at 9657 3159 via WhatsApp or phone call.

Thank you for your kindness and generosity in supporting our community.

passiton.name: adult diapers
passiton.description: unused 12 pieces available
passiton.location: Pasir Ris, Simei, Tampines

name: Leather Sofa
description:
Client is a single mother caring for her teenage daughter and they currently reside in a one-room public rental flat. Mother has a diagnosed mental health condition which significantly affects her ability to sustain long‑term employment. The family’s financial situation deteriorated further following a divorce a few months ago, resulting in ongoing financial strain.

Mother also has asthma and experiences discomfort with the family’s current fabric couch, which tends to trap dust and allergens, affecting her breathing and comfort at home. As such, she is hoping to replace the existing couch with a small two‑seater leather or leather‑like couch, which would be easier to clean and more suitable for her health needs.

In addition, mother is currently using a single folding mattress that is old and worn down, affecting her comfort in resting. As such, she is seeking support for a replacement single folding mattress.

Assistance with delivery would be greatly appreciated.
